name: Jacklyn's Pistachio-Mint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, pudding, eggs, water, oil, extract, and food coloring in a bowl.
2. Blend the ingredients together.
3. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13-by-9-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
7. Cake is done when it pulls away from the side of the pan. Do not underbake.
8. Remove cake from oven.
9. Place chocolate-covered mint candies over the top, covering completely.
10. Return to oven for 3 minutes.
11. Remove cake and spread out mints with a knife or spatula.
12. Cool and cut into squares.
